edges.meaning: Human sense, priority, approval and abort authority stay outside automation.
Systemkatalog owns the map semantics during v0.
Bureau can hand scoped work to the operator layer.
PRs, branches, issues and reviews remain GitHub-owned state.
Checks and review gates provide hard technical feedback.
RepoGround provides Systemkatalog with verifiable, citable codebase context.
Steuerboard can provide read-only repo-state signals, not decisions.
Vibe-Lab provides method experiments and evidence patterns.
Chronik provides event trace and historical continuity.
Schauwerk may render map views without owning the map canon.
Weltgewebe product work is still validated through repo, PR and CI state.
Device Graph may describe infrastructure devices; it is not the ecosystem-governance map canon.
Systemkatalog provides map artifacts for Leitstand display.
Leitstand observes the map as orientation, not truth.
Chronik provides event trace artifacts for timelines.
Bureau may provide read-only task status artifacts.
Primary repo state can be reflected.
Primary check state can be reflected.
Plexer delivers bounded operational events to Chronik agent.ledger when configured.
Grabowski may write task-local agent-run events through an explicit Chronik outbox path.
Chronik event presence can support evidence references; Bureau still owns task and verification truth.
Leitstand may display Chronik state without treating the display as authority.
Chronik may supply frozen historical outcome cohorts as evidence for prospectively registered Vibe-Lab experiments; no policy or task is auto-applied.
Metarepo provides Fleet membership; Systemkatalog remains authority for purpose, relations and entrypoints.
Canonical contracts originate in Metarepo and are mirrored for validation and publication.
WGX provides reusable Fleet checks and repository workflow mechanics.
Mirrored contracts are checked against their fixtures and source contract.
semantAH provides the semantic memory and knowledge-graph layer used by HausKI.
HausKI Audio is the bounded audio and automation surface adjacent to the local AI stack.
Curated external events are delivered to Chronik as the historical ingest authority.
Redacted on-device context events are emitted to Chronik.
Redacted embeddings and context signals can feed semantic indexing without raw-text authority.
Sichter reviews repository changes and may prepare pull requests within policy boundaries.
Heimgeist may inspect catalog projections for reflection but does not own catalog truth.
The local operator entry points to the canonical ecosystem map without duplicating it.
Vault material may inform catalog edits but is not active catalog canon.
Commonworld product work is versioned and validated through repository, pull-request and CI state.
The manual local control surface can prepare guarded Git work while GitHub remains primary state.
Heimserver retains the private service-layer and edge contracts; Infra remains the broader host and network runbook surface.
Leitwerk is retained as a normative reference; Bureau owns current task, claim and completion state.
Obsidian Bridge projects machine artifacts into the vault interface without owning vault content.
Snippet Engine Control provides contract-first diagnostics and export planning for the local interaction layer.
Vibe-Lab may export reviewed proposal-ready candidates; Bureau alone decides whether they become work.
Konvergenzregelkreis assesses submitted evidence; Bureau remains the sole owner of tasks, claims and completion.
Leitwerk remains a historical pre-Bureau reference; Konvergenzregelkreis is an independent public protocol and inherits no Leitwerk authority.
